title: Software Engineer
description: Design, develop, test and maintain software applications. Write clean, scalable code and collaborate with cross-functional teams.

title: Frontend Developer
description: Build responsive and interactive user interfaces using modern web technologies. Ensure great user experience.

title: Backend Developer
description: Develop server-side logic, APIs, and databases. Build robust and scalable backend systems.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Work across the entire web stack from database to user interface. Build complete web applications end to end.

title: Data Scientist
description: Extract insights from complex datasets using statistical analysis and machine learning. Communicate findings to stakeholders.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Design and deploy ML models at scale. Build data pipelines and MLOps infrastructure for production systems.

title: Data Analyst
description: Analyze business data to drive decisions. Create dashboards, reports and visualizations for stakeholders.

title: Data Engineer
description: Build and maintain data pipelines, warehouses and infrastructure. Ensure reliable data delivery at scale.

title: AI Research Engineer
description: Research and develop novel AI algorithms and architectures. Publish findings and translate research to products.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Automate infrastructure, manage CI/CD pipelines, and ensure system reliability and scalability.

title: Cloud Architect
description: Design and oversee cloud infrastructure strategies. Ensure security, scalability and cost efficiency.

title: Site Reliability Engineer
description: Ensure production systems are reliable, scalable and fast. Bridge the gap between development and operations.

title: Android Developer
description: Build and maintain native Android applications with high performance and great UX.

title: iOS Developer
description: Build and maintain native iOS applications for iPhone and iPad.

title: React Native Developer
description: Build cross-platform mobile apps using React Native that work on both iOS and Android.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Monitor, detect and respond to security threats. Conduct vulnerability assessments and penetration tests.

title: Product Manager
description: Define product vision and roadmap. Work with engineering, design and marketing to deliver user value.

title: UX/UI Designer
description: Design intuitive and beautiful user interfaces. Conduct user research and create wireframes, prototypes, and design systems.

title: Business Analyst
description: Bridge business and technology by gathering requirements, analysing processes and recommending solutions.

title: Financial Analyst
description: Analyse financial data, build models and provide investment or business recommendations.

title: Blockchain Developer
description: Design and implement blockchain-based solutions including smart contracts and decentralised applications.

title: Game Developer
description: Design and build video games or game engines. Implement gameplay mechanics, physics and graphics systems.

title: Embedded Systems Engineer
description: Develop software for embedded hardware systems such as microcontrollers, IoT devices and real-time systems.

title: QA Engineer
description: Ensure software quality through manual and automated testing. Identify bugs and improve testing processes.

title: Technical Writer
description: Create clear and concise documentation for software products, APIs and developer tools.
